title: schizachyrium urceolatum
intro: Schizachyrium urceolatum, also known as Little Bluestem, is a perennial grass native to North America, particularly in the central and eastern regions. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Schizachyrium urceolatum include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and aiding in the treatment of digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Little Bluestem can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
